title: District Court Rayagada – Junior Clerk/Copyist – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: District Court Rayagada Junior Clerk/Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Junior Clerk/Copyist. Candidates with Diploma, Any Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 17-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District Court Rayagada official website rayagada.dcourts.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University, Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute, Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. standard

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Rayagada Junior Clerk/Copyist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: District Court Rayagada Junior Clerk/Copyist Recruitment 2026
